concerns.text: Primary data sources (Knot Atlas, KnotInfo) explicitly marked as 'NO verified source found (per # Verified datasets block)'. Plan assumes data availability without URL verification. Cannot execute data download pipeline without confirmed accessible sources.

FR-001 requires downloading from 'https://katlas.org' but research.md acknowledges no verified source found. Dataset may not provide all required invariants (crossing number, braid index, hyperbolic volume, alternating classification) in accessible format for all 10,000+ prime knots.

Algorithm validation requires KnotInfo reference values, but KnotInfo also marked as 'NO verified source found'. If reference coverage <10%, validation skipped per FR-003 — but without verified source, coverage cannot be assessed beforehand.

Dataset Strategy section describes data sources by name only with explicit 'do NOT fabricate URL' instruction. Plan should document contingency data sources (e.g., Hoste-Thistlethwaite-Weeks tables, arXiv 2402.02717 supplementary data) before implementation.

Download command references 'Knot Atlas' without specifying exact API endpoint, file format, or authentication requirements. Quickstart should include fallback mechanism if primary source unavailable.
